arts.ttl: BFW Question of the Day — March 15th: What’s your prediction for Union Berlin vs. Bayern Munich in the Bundesliga?
arts.sum: Bayern Munich is on the road to face Union Berlin for the squad’s final Bundesliga match before the international break. The Bavarians will be prohibitive favorites, but there is a chance that players could be distracted ahead of the break...or they could stay hot and put away Union Berlin for the second time this season.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich now want to sign £50m attacker who’s expected to sign for Arsenal this summer – journalist
arts.sum: The summer transfer window really isn’t all that far away. Indeed, we’re into the business end of the season, and while there’s still plenty to...

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich star Alphonso Davies heaps praise on “top coach” Vincent Kompany
arts.sum: Given his short career prior to the appointment, the fact that he was far from Bayern’s first choice coach and that he was comfortably relegated from the Premier League with Burnley (I bet you’re not sick of hearing of that one), there were multiple reasons for people to be skeptical about the Belgian’s appointment in Munich. One of those players, Alphonso Davies, continued to heap praise on Kompany: “Vincent is a top coach.

arts.ttl: Union Berlin vs Bayern Munich Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Union Berlin, currently in 13th place, will host league leaders Bayern Munich in a Bundesliga clash on Saturday, March 15, 2025, at 14:30 GMT. Ahead of the game, we’ve made a prediction for the...

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich reconsidering stance on Eric Dier
arts.sum: A contract extension for Eric #Dier is no longer being ruled out at FC Bayern, mainly due to his solid performances in recent weeks. Eric Dier has made quite an impression since joining Bayern Munich back in January of 2024.

arts.ttl: Arsenal & Bayern keen on Williams - Saturday's gossip
arts.sum: Arsenal and Bayern Munich are in competition to sign Spain winger Nico Williams, while Newcastle striker Alexander Isak says he is likely to speak to the club about a new contract.

arts.ttl: Thomas Tuchel reveals different England role for Harry Kane than under Gareth Southgate
arts.sum: England boss has also insisted he will not allow “any exceptions” when it comes to high-pressing approach

arts.ttl: Leroy Sané could be set for a move to the Premier League
arts.sum: The former Manchester City and current Bayern Munich winger might make a comeback to the Premier League in the summer, as Sky Germany reports.

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah equals Harry Kane and Sergio Aguero's Premier League record... and overtakes Liverpool legend Steven Gerrard
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah equalled a Premier League record held by Harry Kane and Sergio Aguero after the Liverpool winger enjoyed a historic run of games in February.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Max Eberl gives insight on team’s upcoming contract talks, Joshua Kimmich’s negotiation, and a potential new deal for Leon Goretzka (!?)
arts.sum: At the press conference ahead of Bayern Munich ’s match against Union Berlin in the Bundesliga, board member for sport Max Eberl touched on a number of topics, including a the chatter that Leon Goretzka might warrant a new contract — something that Eberl has been rumored to be adamantly against, Finally, Eberl was asked about the status of Thomas Müller, Leroy Sané, and Eric Dier and indicated that there has been contact with most of the players.
